onboarding.slide1Subtitle: Check-in validated within 200 m of the property. EB Services contract rigor.
onboarding.slide2Subtitle: Professional before and after photos. Total client trust.
onboarding.slide3Subtitle: Schedule, inventory and execution in one place. Cutting-edge technology.

auth.brandTagline: Field execution with GPS, photos and daily schedule
auth.providerOnlyNote: This app is exclusively for EB service providers.

intro.title: Professional cleaning in your pocket
intro.subtitle: Schedule, GPS and visual proof in an app built for EB providers.
intro.feature2: Before and after photos with professional quality
intro.feature3: Daily schedule and inventory in one place

choice.title: How would you like to continue?
choice.subtitle: Sign in to your account or create your provider registration.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to access your schedule
login.providerOnly: This app is for service providers only.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your provider account email to receive the code
forgotPassword.resetSubtitle: Create a new password to access your account
forgotPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
forgotPassword.successMessage: Your password was updated. Sign in with your new password.

register.title: Let's create your account
register.subtitle: Fill in your details to register as an EB provider
register.terms: I accept the EB Services terms of use
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.successMessage: Registration received! Wait for account activation before signing in.

permissions.title: Required permissions
permissions.subtitle: To ensure operational rigor and proof of execution, we need access to the resources below.
permissions.locationDesc: We validate you are within 200 m of the property before check-in. Essential for the EB contract.
permissions.cameraDesc: Record visual proof before and after each cleaning. The client needs to trust the service.
permissions.denied: We need location and camera access to execute service orders.

schedule.title: Today's Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Cleanings assigned for today · Tap to start execution
schedule.emptySubtitle: When cleanings are scheduled, they will appear here.

execution.step1Hint: Validate your proximity to the property before starting the cleaning.
execution.step2Hint: Take at least 1 photo of the initial property state.
execution.photosRequired: Add at least one before photo.
execution.step3Hint: Mark additional services performed during this cleaning.
execution.step4Hint: Finish with result photos and GPS validation.
execution.afterPhotosRequired: Add at least one after photo.
execution.geofenceDescription: You must be within {{radius}} m of the property.
execution.offlineSavedMessage: Your data was saved and will sync automatically when signal returns.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Completed services and accumulated earnings
history.emptySubtitle: When you finish cleanings, they will appear here.
history.noPhotos: No photos recorded for this service.

inventory.title: Field Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Products at properties you service
inventory.criticalAlert: {{count}} item(s) at critical stock — restock urgently
inventory.emptySubtitle: When products are registered at your properties, they will appear here.
inventory.readOnlyHint: To edit, open a cleaning scheduled for today in Schedule (pending or in progress).
inventory.editableHint: Today's cleaning is active — you can report inventory for this property.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.subtitle: You do not have permission to access this resource.
forbidden.message: Contact EB Services support if you believe this is an error.

realtime.newOrderMessage: A new cleaning was added to your schedule.
realtime.sessionEndedMessage: Your account was deactivated. Contact support.
